industry.headline: POWERGRID Invites Bids for 1 GWh Battery Storage Systems
industry.summary: Power Grid Corporation of India (POWERGRID) has invited bids for up to 250 MW/1,000 MWh of four-hour battery energy storage systems. The procurement aims to enhance grid stability and renewable energy integration. Bids are open for the deployment of battery storage infrastructure with a total capacity of 1 GWh. This initiative supports India's energy transition objectives.

industry.headline: PureSky Closes $62 Million Credit Financing Upsizing
industry.summary: PureSky Energy, a Denver-based developer, owner, and operator of community solar, commercial and industrial solar, and energy storage projects, has closed $62 million in upsizing of corporate credit financing. The funds will support project development and expansion across the US renewable energy sector. This financing strengthens PureSky's position in the growing solar and storage market.

The acquisition enhances Unirac's product portfolio and market presence in the North American solar industry, expanding its capabilities in solar racking solutions.

This move supports its goal of accelerating clean energy deployment worldwide.

learn.title: Electric Vehicles: Motors & Charging
learn.intro: EVs reduce fossil fuel dependence, cut emissions, and offer lower operating costs. Understanding their mechanics is key to accelerating global adoption and meeting climate goals.
learn.c1_text: EV motors convert battery electricity into motion with 90% efficiency, far surpassing internal combustion engines. Permanent magnet or induction motors enable smooth acceleration and regenerative braking.
learn.c2_text: Regenerative braking recovers up to 70% of kinetic energy during deceleration, storing it in the battery. This system extends range by 10-30%, reducing energy waste.
learn.c3_text: India’s EV charging network expanded to 4,500+ stations by 2024, with policies mandating 50% of new cars to be electric by 2030. Charging standards like Bharat AC 002 ensure compatibility.
learn.stat4: EV battery lifespan: 10-15 years (80% capacity retention)

learn.title: Flow Batteries for Grid Storage
learn.intro: Flow batteries store energy in external tanks, enabling scalable, long-duration storage to balance renewable energy supply and grid demand.
learn.c1_text: Vanadium redox flow batteries store energy in liquid electrolytes, allowing indefinite cycling. They’re ideal for grid storage due to 20,000+ charge cycles and minimal degradation.
learn.c2_text: Iron-based flow batteries (e.g., iron-chromium) cut costs by 50% compared to vanadium. Projects like China’s 200 MWh system prove their viability for large-scale storage.
learn.c3_text: India plans 270 GW of renewable capacity by 2030, requiring 150 GW of storage. Flow batteries could stabilize grids in regions like Rajasthan with high solar intermittency.
learn.stat1: India: 4.5 GW grid storage planned by 2025

learn.title: Solid-State Batteries: Safer & Denser
learn.intro: Solid-state batteries replace liquid electrolytes with solids, boosting energy density and safety. They’re critical for EVs and renewable storage.
learn.c1_text: Solid electrolytes eliminate flammable liquids, reducing fire risks. Toyota’s prototypes use 50% less cobalt, cutting costs and environmental impact.
learn.c2_text: Solid-state batteries pack 2–3x more energy per kg than lithium-ion. A 500 km range EV could shrink to the size of a 300 km model.
learn.c3_text: India aims for 50% EV penetration by 2030. Solid-state tech could cut battery costs by 40%, making EVs affordable for 500 million+ Indians.
learn.stat1: India: 100+ EV battery factories planned by 2030

learn.title: Carbon Markets & Clean Energy
learn.intro: Carbon markets let companies buy/sell emissions permits, funding clean projects. They drive innovation and reduce global emissions.
learn.c1_text: Each credit represents 1 ton of CO2 reduced. Google offsets 100% of its emissions via offsets, funding wind farms and reforestation.
learn.c2_text: The EU Emissions Trading System reduced power sector emissions by 35% since 2005. Prices hit €80/ton in 2023, pushing firms to decarbonize.
learn.c3_text: India’s carbon market, under NDCs, could generate $200B annually by 2030. Projects like Delhi’s waste-to-energy plants earn credits via the PM-KUSUM scheme.

learn.title: Vehicle-to-Grid (V2G) Tech
learn.intro: V2G lets EVs supply power back to the grid, balancing demand and integrating renewables. It turns cars into mobile power reserves.
learn.c1_text: V2G enables EVs to discharge 200+ kW during peak demand. Nissan Leaf owners in California earn $100/year from grid services.
learn.c2_text: A 100-car V2G fleet provides 2 MW of power, equivalent to a small gas plant. Japan’s Tokyo Electric Power Company tests this with 1,000 EVs.
learn.c3_text: Delhi’s 2024 pilot connects 500 EVs to stabilize grids during monsoon peaks. NTPC plans 10,000 EV-based storage units by 2027.

learn.title: Floating Solar Farms on Water
learn.intro: Floating solar panels conserve water, reduce evaporation, and boost efficiency. They’re a game-changer for water-scarce regions.
learn.c1_text: Water cools panels, increasing efficiency by 10-15%. A 1 MW floating farm in India generates 1.15 MW due to lower temperatures.
learn.c2_text: Floating solar reduces evaporation by 80%. A 1 ha lake in Gujarat saves 1.2 million liters/year, critical for arid regions.
learn.c3_text: India’s 600 MW floating solar target by 2025 includes projects on reservoirs in Kerala and Punjab. NTPC’s 150 MW farm powers 75,000 homes.
